Skye / Kaixu Sovereign Workspace

SuperIDEv2 Sovereign Author Publishing System

Server-backed auth, Stripe gateway execution, runtime commerce sync, and vendor portal workflows now sit inside the system alongside SkyeDocx Pro, SkyeBlog, binary publishing jobs, persisted release history, catalog control, and signed workspace export/import.

Gateway Only

Operator Gate

required

This platform stays closed by default and can authenticate directly against the packaged server routes when an API base is provided, while still retaining the signed browser fallback lane.

Current Release Claim
Server-backed auth lane present. Payment adapters present. Submission adapters present. Browser shell still supports signed local operator fallback. Live readiness now depends on environment configuration and provider credentials.
Current release surface now includes deployable production lanes plus browser fallback proof.
